metadata.title: About us
metadata.description: TJ CAR LLC — your trusted broker for cars from Japan and Korea. Auction bidding, in-stock cars, and vehicle reports.

hero.title: The team that brings Japanese & Korean cars to Mongolia, reliably
hero.subtitle: Since 2022 we've handled auction bidding, brokerage, shipping and reports end-to-end. With TJcar.mn launched in 2024, customers can browse every Japan auction in their own language.

story.heading: A transparent bridge between Japanese and Korean markets
story.body: TJ Car LLC has been importing and brokering cars from Japan and Korea since 2022. In 2024 we launched TJcar.mn, giving Mongolian customers free real-time access to every Japan auction listing in their own language — with bidding, accurate pricing in MNT, and end-to-end order placement.

services.heading: What we do
services.subheading: A single team for every step — from auction to handover.

japan.title: Japan orders
japan.body: Bid across 30+ auction houses in Japan, secure the best price.

korea.title: Korea orders
korea.body: Direct from Encar to Ulaanbaatar in 14 days.

auction.title: Auction brokerage
auction.body: We bid on your behalf at Japanese and Korean auctions.

ready.title: In-stock cars
ready.body: Cars already in Mongolia or in transit — ready to view.

report.title: Vehicle report
report.body: Auction history, accidents, mileage, real photos in PDF.

custom.title: Custom sourcing
custom.body: Year, color, mileage, options — sourced exactly to your spec.

select.title: Select
select.body: Pick a car on TJcar.mn and confirm with your account manager.

deposit.title: 30–50% deposit
deposit.body: We sign a contract and you pay 30–50% of the total upfront.

auction.title: Auction / purchase
auction.body: Our team bids and secures the car at a fair market price.

ship.title: Shipping
ship.body: Insured shipping from Japan or Korea to Mongolia.

handover.title: Final payment & handover
handover.body: Settle the balance and we hand the car directly to you.

savings.title: 10–20% savings
savings.body: Buying below market price thanks to live auction access.

transparency.title: Transparent pricing
transparency.body: Every order is contracted; payments go through the company account only.

endToEnd.title: End-to-end service
endToEnd.body: From auction to handover we run every step.

value.title: Lasting value
value.body: Inspected cars with real grades hold their resale value.

callout.heading: Regulation + market shift
callout.body: From January 1, 2025, Ulaanbaatar no longer issues plates for cars 10+ years old. Buyers must pick newer vehicles, lifting demand for fresh imports.

team.heading: People working for you across three countries
team.subheading: Local representatives manage every step of the chain.

cta.heading: Get your next car from a team you can trust
cta.body: From order to delivery, TJ Car stays with you the whole way.

landed.title: Est. landed price
infoParagraphs: This price includes the fees paid in Japan, shipping costs and all taxes due in Mongolia — in other words, the total cost to get this car into your hands.
Note: it is estimated from the average sold prices of cars with similar specifications.
Placing a realistic, competitive bid based on this figure improves your chances of winning.

metadata.title: Auction Report
metadata.description: The full Japanese auction history as a PDF report in 2 minutes. Mileage verification, accident records, high-quality photos. Only 20,000₮.

hero.subheading: Just enter the lot or chassis number. We automatically gather how the car looked at the auction — mileage, accident records, water damage and original high-quality photos — into a single PDF report, with no human involvement.

steps.heading: 3 steps, 2 minutes
steps.subheading: Everything is automatic. You only enter the number.

input.title: Enter the number
input.body: Type the lot or chassis number and run the search.

collect.title: The system collects data
collect.body: Auction archive, mileage check, accident records and photos are merged automatically.

ready.title: PDF is ready
ready.body: Your full report is ready to download within 2 minutes.

contents.heading: Everything you need to decide
contents.subheading: Based on real Japanese auction data.

km.title: Mileage verification
km.body: We verify the real mileage against the auction record.

accident.title: Accident records
accident.body: Repairs, collisions and damage history shown clearly.

water.title: Water damage
water.body: Detects cars with flood or water damage.

photos.title: High-quality photos
photos.body: Original high-resolution photos from the auction.

history.title: Auction history
history.body: How many times it went to auction, at what price and grade.

grade.title: Grade
grade.body: Exterior and interior grades and overall score.

sample.heading: Here's what it looks like
sample.body: All the information delivered clearly, in one tidy PDF.

pricing.heading: One report — one price
pricing.note: No extra fees. Ready in 2 minutes once paid.

q1.q: How fast is the report ready?
q1.a: Usually within 2 minutes after you enter the number.

q2.a: The Japanese auction lot number or the car's chassis (chassis/VIN) number.

q3.q: Is it checked by a person?
q3.a: No. The system gathers and compiles everything automatically, so no human involvement is needed.

q4.a: One report is 20,000₮. No hidden fees.

q5.q: Where does the data come from?
q5.a: It is based on Japanese auction archives and original grading data.

finalCta.heading: Know the history before you buy
